confirmed_issue: The City field and phone OTP controls were previously injected into the DOM outside React.
React re-rendered the Contact step and removed those injected controls.
The old validator could then show 'Select a district' even when a District was visibly selected.
final_fix: City / Town is rendered directly inside the React Contact & Location component.
The City options update from the selected District.
Phone number, Verify, OTP, Confirm OTP and Resend controls are rendered directly by React.
One to five phone numbers are supported and every number must be verified.
Continue remains disabled until District, City and all phone OTP verifications are complete.
The publishing runtime reads the verified phone tokens from the React component.
